hero.title: Hi, I'm André.
hero.desc:
I'll publish about software engineering here.
Notes, demos, and experiments on building systems that are pleasant to maintain, easy to understand, and reliable in production.
labs.title: Labs
labs.todo.title: Todo
labs.todo.desc: Local-first, E2E-encrypted. WebAuthn PRF key derivation, Yjs CRDT, AES-GCM relay sync.
labs.modulith.title: Frontend Modulith
labs.modulith.desc: One build, one deploy — module boundaries enforced at compile time. No microfrontends, no runtime federation.
labs.federation.title: Module Federation
labs.federation.desc: The same demo, rebuilt as independently deployed microfrontends — module boundaries enforced at runtime instead of compile time.
contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Drop me a message. Leave your email if you want a reply.
contact.status.ok: Thanks! Your message is on its way.
contact.status.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
contact.status.error.validation: Please fill in the required fields correctly.
